title: Logrhythm Alarm Handling
content:
This playbook is triggered by fetching a LogRhythm alarm incident. 
The playbook executes the commands: lr-alarms-list, lr-alarm-summary and lr-users-list to get more useful data for the alarm.

Cortex XSOAR/XSIAM SOAR playbook from the Cortex XSOAR pack (LogRhythmRest, xsoar-supported).

Integrations/scripts used: lr-alarm-summary, lr-alarms-list, lr-users-list.

  \ to get more useful data for the alarm."
